decisions.rationale: Observation 'New York City Transit' (agency) resolves to base_record_id entity_mta-nyct. The registry card for entity_mta-nyct already lists source 2012_08_hylan_start_of_service_flyer and carries the alias entity_nyc-transit-2012-hylan-flyer. The observation confirms the existing record; no different or new canonical entity is needed.
